name: Jellyfin Recents
description: A customizable recently-played view with flexible grouping and sorting. Downloads fonts on first use.
overview: Browse your recently played media grouped by day/week/month/quarter/year, with multiple sort options (play time, title, release date, favorite) and thumbnail/poster/list view modes. Includes a thumbnail grid generator with overlay text and theming. Fonts are downloaded automatically on first use.

name: Jellyfin Recents + Fonts
description: A customizable recently-played view with flexible grouping and sorting. Includes bundled Latin fonts — no internet access needed.
overview: Same as Jellyfin Recents, but ships with pre-bundled Latin fonts (Roboto, RobotoMono, Oswald, Playfair Display, Cinzel). Choose this variant if your server has restricted internet access or you prefer a self-contained install. CJK fonts (Noto CJK) are still sourced from the system or downloaded separately.
